name: Legend-State (Ultra-Fast React State Management)

performance.notes: Proxy-based fine-grained reactivity; minimal re-renders; benchmarks faster than Zustand/Jotai

agent_readiness.notes: Fine-grained reactive state using Proxy. observable({}) creates reactive state. observer() HOC for auto-tracking. Memo component for granular re-renders. Computed values, persistence plugins (localStorage, MMKV, IndexedDB), sync plugins (Firebase, Supabase, Legend Sync). Batched updates. TypeScript-first. Works with React, React Native, Preact. Local-first sync capabilities. Faster than Zustand for apps with frequent state updates. Used in Legend (financial app).

gotchas: Proxy-based — may behave unexpectedly with non-proxy-aware code
Different mental model from atom-based state
v3 has breaking changes from v2
best_when: React apps needing fine-grained reactivity for performance
Local-first apps needing offline sync (Legend Sync, Firebase)
React Native apps with frequent state updates
Apps with complex nested state needing granular updates
avoid_when: Simple apps where Zustand is sufficient
summary: Legend-State is an ultra-fast React state management library using fine-grained Proxy reactivity. observable() creates reactive state, observer() auto-tracks dependencies. Persistence and sync plugins (Firebase, Supabase, localStorage). TypeScript-first. Benchmarks faster than Zustand/Jotai for frequent updates. Best for performance-critical React apps and local-first apps needing sync capabilities.
